channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ARB rules Kia's Tasman ad trivialises neurological disorders
item.description: The Advertising Regulatory Board (ARB) has ruled that Kia South Africa's TV advert for the Tasman bakkie breached advertising standards by potentially trivialising neurological disorders. The commerci...

item.title: Kenya Railways Arrests Six Over Fake Madaraka Express Ticket Fraud
item.description: Kenya Railways has arrested six individuals linked to a fake ticket booking scheme targeting passengers. The suspects allegedly operated fraudulent platforms and impersonated the corporation to defrau...

item.title: Teams that didn't win the World Cup still made history in 2026
item.description: The article explores how teams that didn't win the World Cup can still achieve success through overperformance. It highlights historical examples like France (1998) and Italy (2006), which exceeded ex...

item.title: Liz Lawrence Announces 2026 UK Tour Following 'Vespers' Album Release
item.description: Liz Lawrence has announced a 2026 UK tour to promote her latest album, 'Vespers', which was released last month. The tour, set to begin on 11 November, will feature performances in Oxford, Sheffield, ...

item.title: Civil grand jury urges California sheriff’s oversight group to seek legal counsel for effective accountability
item.description: A civil grand jury in California has recommended that the state’s sheriff’s watchdog group, which oversees law enforcement accountability, should seek legal counsel to improve its effectiveness. The j...

item.title: Indian Researchers Create Detailed 3D Brainstem Atlas
item.description: Scientists at the Indian Institute of Technology, Madras (IIT-M) have developed the world's most detailed 3D cellular atlas of the human brainstem, linking whole-brain MRI views to individual neurons ...

item.title: Kapamilya Stars Perform Serenade in Victorias City for James Reid's Hits
item.description: The article reports on a recent event where Kapamilya heartthrobs, including James Reid, performed a serenade in Victorias City as part of the ASAP XP promotional activities. The event showcased the s...

item.title: Prosecution withholds Zuleika Lopez as witness in Sara Duterte impeachment case
item.description: The prosecution has decided not to call Zuleika Lopez, the chief of staff of Vice President Sara Duterte, as a witness in her impeachment trial. Private prosecutor Lorna Kapunan stated that the defens...

item.title: Kwimba District Council Funds Women, Youth Groups with Domestic Revenue Loans
item.description: The Kwimba District Council in Tanzania’s Mwanza region has distributed 517 million shillings in loans to 26 community groups through a government-backed economic empowerment program. The initiative t...

item.title: Kenyan MP Chooses Simplicity Over Privileges, Prepares for Retirement
item.description: Lurambi MP Titus Khamala has sparked discussions by choosing to drive himself around his constituency without a driver or police bodyguard. The lawmaker emphasized that this decision is part of his pr...

item.title: Mother of slain #EndSARS journalist pleads for burial after six-year wait
item.description: Bosede Onifade, mother of slain #EndSARS journalist Pelumi Onifade, has appealed to authorities to release her son’s body for burial six years after his death during the 2020 protests. A coroner’s inq...

item.title: AJK Government Launches Operation to Clear JAAC-Blocked Routes and Restore Normalcy
item.description: The Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) government has initiated a clearance operation to remove obstacles created by the banned Jammu and Kashmir Awami Action Committee (JAAC) at entry and exit points, emph...

item.title: Redesigning a Dated Cottage Loft with Nordic Design Elements
item.description: The article addresses the challenge of revitalizing a cluttered cottage loft used by children for TV and gaming. Key recommendations include installing motorized blinds to manage glare from windows, r...

item.title: New Seasons of Reality TV Shows and Celebrity Insights
item.description: The article highlights upcoming entertainment content, including the return of the reality TV series 'Izingane zeS’thembu' for its fourth season, set to air on Mzansi Magic. It also features Linda Mto...

item.title: JustMarkets Introduces Web-Based Trading Platform for Enhanced Accessibility
item.description: JustMarkets, a multi-asset brokerage firm, has launched a web-based trading platform called the Web Terminal, enabling clients to trade directly from their browsers without needing software downloads....

item.title: A German Man's Pursuit of the Perfect Bread Slice
item.description: Jan, a German man known online as Germanbreadcutter, has gained over 100,000 followers across social media platforms for his meticulous bread-slicing technique. Using high-end knives and digital calip...

item.title: Shoprite's AI assistant enables rapid grocery shopping with personalized recommendations
item.description: A Checkers Sixty60 customer used ShopriteX's AI shopping assistant 'Pixie' to complete a R1,500 online grocery order in just 15 seconds. The technology, which learns user preferences and predicts need...

item.title: Republican Lawmaker Vows to Resist GOP Budget After Being Snubbed from Key Meeting
item.description: Rep. Erin Houchin (R-IN) expressed frustration over being excluded from a Camp David meeting where GOP leaders discussed a reconciliation bill. The bill, which includes cuts to Medicare and Medicaid f...

item.title: Tanzania's Strong Representation in AFRIMMA 2026 with 11 Nominated Artistes
item.description: Tanzania has emerged as the most represented country in East Africa at the 2026 African Muzik Magazine Awards (AFRIMMA), with 11 artistes and creatives earning nominations across multiple categories. ...

item.title: Australia faces rising fuel costs amid escalating US-Iran tensions over oil shipments
item.description: The resumption of hostilities between the United States and Iran has disrupted oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz, prompting concerns about soaring diesel prices in Australia. This conflict, which...
